title: Add support for criu's tcp-close functionality.
body:
Fixes: #26676

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Add `--tcp-close` option to container restore to allow restoring multiple copies of a container with tcp connections
```

#### Related PR

[PR to enable --tcp-close in crun](https://github.com/containers/crun/pull/1835)

comments.body:
Test failures expected given we don't have a `crun` with the new flag in our test VMs.

Code LGTM
/approve

> This is missing podman-remote support, the flags must be wired into the REST API and bindings/remote client.

I'll update podman-remote to add support for this.

> I only see the debian test fail with unknown flag on crun, the fedora rawhide images seem to have the flag but actually just fail to checkpoint likely due #26289 So I guess the test needs to be skipped for now like the others regardless but still the test should be changes to actually verify the tcp conn got closed.

I'll add the skip for the test
I validated that I could do a restore with `--tcp-close` through podman-remote.
